name: neurawork-cc-harness
description: NeuraWork Claude Code harness: repo-local, self-maintaining project knowledge. Bundles two independently installable skills — knowledge-compiler (distils session logs into a per-repo knowledge base) and claudemd-lerner (keeps the CLAUDE.md hierarchy + docs/ current). Knowledge and docs always live inside the repo, never in .claude/. Recon + brownfield seed on install so existing repos can be upgraded.
